context_for_next_testing_agent: Discogs Import feature fully tested and working. Demo user is connected to Discogs as 'katieintheafterglow' with 143 records in collection. Token-based auth (POST /api/discogs/connect-token) is the primary connection method - OAuth is also implemented but requires consumer key/secret. Import progress shows 139 imported, 4 skipped (duplicates). All backend APIs verified with pytest. Frontend Discogs card shows Sync Now button and 'Connected as katieintheafterglow'. Sorting, likes, and comments all working correctly.

regression.sorting: WORKING - All 10 options present and functional
regression.comments: WORKING - Can expand and submit comments
